Tony's Pizza

December 2024

Health Score: 67🟡

INSIGHT

Your biggest problem this month is Tuesday lunch. You're paying 4 staff but making $340 that shift. Cut one position and save $210 every week.

ACTION

Cut one Tuesday lunch shift

💰Saves $210/week = $840/month
